text: Artificial intelligence, or AI, refers to the ability of computers and machines to perform tasks that normally require human intelligence. This includes learning, problem-solving, and decision-making. A key part of AI is machine learning, where systems improve at tasks by analyzing data instead of being explicitly programmed. Deep learning is a more advanced form of machine learning that uses complex neural networks to process information, similar to the human brain. AI is already a part of daily life—from voice assistants on smartphones and recommendation systems on streaming services, to facial recognition in cameras and navigation apps that find the fastest route.
